{{Quote|But Vasi is not normal. He likes sick things. He can command a Shamed One to do things that no true caste would ever do, or want to do, or want done.|Uunu about Vasi|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest" />}}
'''Vasi''' was a [[Warrior caste|warrior]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A slavemaster, Vasi was in charge of the [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]], [[Worker caste|Workers]], and [[Shamed Ones]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Vasi was sadistic even by Yuuzhan Vong standards. He also had no problem engaging in sexual relations with Shamed Ones (deviant behavior on a number of levels in Yuuzhan Vong society) and seemed to have a particular attraction to a Shamed One named [[Uunu]].<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest" />
